greeting: Hi there! Thanks for reaching out to Bond's HVAC Services. I'm here to help you with heating, cooling, or air quality questions. How can I help you today?

services.name: AC Repair
services.description: Same-day air conditioning repair for all major brands

services.name: Furnace Installation
services.description: Full furnace replacement including removal of old unit

services.name: Duct Cleaning
services.description: Complete air duct cleaning and sanitization

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer 0% financing for 12 months on installations over $2,000 through GreenSky.

faqs.question: How quickly can you come out?
faqs.answer: For emergencies, we offer same-day service. For routine maintenance, we can usually schedule within 2-3 business days.
